programme.title: The Shed
programme.desc: Stan is an orphan who lives with his abusive grandfather. Things are not better at school, where he has to protect his best friend Dommer against the cool crowd who are bullies. But life gets worse for Stan when he finds a murderous creature in his grandfather's backyard shed. His worst nightmares come true when the creature kills his grandfather. But Stan cannot go to the police for fear that he will be put into foster care. Dommer suddenly comes up with the bright idea of luring the school bullies into the shed to put an end to their tyranny. But how do they do that?

programme.title: Arwah Noni Belanda
programme.desc: Batavia, 1834. Hellen Van Stolch was the only daughter of Jacob, a Dutch-German landlord with a large plantation. She suffered a tragic fate of untold horror and her vengeful spirit roams the land until this very day. One day, she appears in the subconscious of Sarah Astari, a novelist who is working on a horror story. At first, Sarah is oblivious to this inter-dimensional intrusion and thinks it is nothing more than a nightmare. But everything changes when Hellen's spirit unleases terror after terror on Sarah and her family.

programme.title: Hellbender
programme.desc: Izzy and her mother live a lonely life up in the mountains. Izzy has a rare condition that prevents her from hanging out with kids her own age. It is a good thing that she and her mother are best friends and even have their own rock band, H6LLB6ND6R. But none of this stops Izzy from questioning her reality. Soon, Izzy rebels against her mother's strict rules by befriending a girl who lives nearby. One day, while playing a game of dare, Izzy eats a live worm. Suddenly, an insatiable and violent hunger is awakened in her. Izzy soon discovers the secrets of her family's past and the ancient power in her bloodline.

programme.title: Mantra
programme.desc: Muzir is betrayed by Hasbi who gets him imprisoned. But with the help of black magic and an uncle who is the prison warden, Muzir is about to take revenge on his enemy.

programme.title: Kisah Seram Hostel
programme.desc: Pada satu malam, sekumpulan pelajar asrama bercerita tentang pengalaman seram masing-masing. Tapi apabila malam kian larut, perbezaan antara cerita dan realiti menjadi semakin samar.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: Setelah mengahwini Zain, Sara tinggal serumah dengan Pak Dolah bapa mertuanya. Kerana dendam keluarga, Sara mula membuat onar dengan menggoda bapa mertuanya sendiri. Lakonan Sharifah Sakinah dan Zaidi Omar.

programme.title: Ghost of Mae Nak
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds buy a cursed property and soon, a streak of bad luck befalls them. A robbery leads to Mak falling into a coma and his wife Nak enslists the help of monks to exorcise him.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 3
programme.desc: The third installation in the horror series is themed on 'solo hide and seek,' a seance technique famous as an urban legend. Sakura Kurata and Kosuke Tsukamoto are members of the movie club at their high school. They organize a movie shoot which revolves around the urban legend and occult game 'hide-and-seek alone'. The game involves a ritual with a doll to contact the dead. The students persuade a teacher to allow them to shoot the movie at midnight in the school. The students begin filming, and they soon experience a lot more than they expected.

programme.title: Mohon Hantuan
programme.desc: Akim seorang penulis novel romantik tiba-tiba dibuka hijabnya dan membolehkan dia untuk melihat hantu yang kemudiannya memohon bantuan Akim untuk mengubah rakan lelakinya menjadi romantik.

programme.title: Faces Of Anne
programme.desc: Anne woke up alone on a mysterious island with no recollection of who she is or how she got there. The staff in the building she woke up in claims that she is in a hospital recovering from her amnesia. But there is something odd with how every girl she meets is named Anne and something sinister roams the building every night. Now, she must quickly figure out how to survive and escape from her predicament.

programme.title: Iblis
programme.desc: Den and Kim have been married for a long time. Den buys a large white house, hoping to revive the long-dead romance between them. However, from the moment they move in, spooky events keep happening, especially to Kim. Den tries to calm her fears, but Kim insists that there is someone - or something - that is watching her. Soon, Den starts to feel her terror, too. Alone in the large white house, there is nowhere for them to hide, including from themselves. Their relationship deteriorates, and catastrophe ensues.

programme.title: Don't Come Back Alive
programme.desc: Police officer Camila, criminal prosecutor Fatima, and police detective angel, face extremely dangerous situations, gruesome murder cases and evil criminals everyday without flinching. During a case in a suburban area, they encounter a sinister female figure, a result of a suicide-by-immolation ritual. Unfortunately for them, the bloodthirsty being, who is more powerful than death itself, is here to play a wicked game with them.

programme.title: Martyr's Lane
programme.desc: Leah, 10, lives in a large, old vicarage with her family. In the day the house is bustling with people; at night it is dark, empty, a space for Leah's nightmares to creep into. She cannot quite work out why her mother seems so distant. At night she is visited by a mysterious guest, who might be able to give her some answers. With a new challenge every night, Leah is rewarded with bits of knowledge that, when pieced together, threaten to shine a dangerous light on both the truth in her nightmares and of the world she lives in.

programme.title: Dilarang Masuk
programme.desc: The new girl Lisa has disappeared without a trace. She was last seen at the top floor of the school, where students are not allowed to enter. Out of curiosity as to Lisa's whereabouts and sympathy for her family, six students decide to venture to the forbidden area to look for her. Instead of finding Lisa there, the six of them are instead followed around by spirits - around school, at cafes, even in their own homes. Bewildered and distraught, they must figure out what really happened to Lisa.

programme.title: Nasi Tangas
programme.desc: Mira will do anything to get her husband's, Hairi, undivided love. Due to her jealousy towards his friendship with her best friend Fatin, Mira learns how to make "nasi kangkang", intended to make Hairi obey Mira. In order to achieve her intention, Mira is willing to go to the extent of sleeping with the shaman.

programme.title: Arwah Noni Belanda
programme.desc: Batavia, 1834. Hellen Van Stolch was the only daughter of Jacob, a Dutch-German landlord with a large plantation. She suffered a tragic fate of untold horror and her vengeful spirit roams the land until this very day. One day, she appears in the subconscious of Sarah Astari, a novelist who is working on a horror story. At first, Sarah is oblivious to this inter-dimensional intrusion and thinks it is nothing more than a nightmare. But everything changes when Hellen's spirit unleases terror after terror on Sarah and her family.

programme.title: Maut
programme.desc: Filem ini menghimpunkan 3 kisah yang membawa keinsafan tentang saat-saat di ambang kematian. Dibintangi oleh Que Haidar, Liyana Jasmay dan Sabrina Hassan.

programme.title: Hantu Bungkus Ikat Tepi
programme.desc: Fuad, Fadli and Fendi come across a blood-covered corpse lying on the road. While poking around, they touch the knife lying next to the body, unaware that they have left their fingerprints on the main weapon. They then decide to dress the corpse and bury it somewhere, tying up the shroud to one side of the head of the corpse. Not long after, they are incessantly harassed by the ghost of the dead corpse that wants them to put the body back in its proper position. Mimie also becomes entangled in the hilarious pursuits of these three young men and is forced to help them find the buried corpse.

programme.title: Arwah Pak Mat, AJK dan Lift
programme.desc: Nordin is shocked by his father's sudden death one day. Coinciding with this is the presidential election of their flat community. When Nordin discovers that the lifts have gone out of order, he enlists the community to help remove his father's remains from his flat on the 25th floor. To do so, Nordin and his community have to overcome various setbacks and challenges.

programme.title: Special Agent
programme.desc: Won Cheol dipaksa menerima misi untuk menghapuskan VIP yang terlibat dalam membangunkan senjata pemusnah di Korea Utara. Operasi rahsia ejen khas Korea Utara dan Selatan bermula!

programme.title: Martyr's Lane
programme.desc: Leah, 10, lives in a large, old vicarage with her family. In the day the house is bustling with people; at night it is dark, empty, a space for Leah's nightmares to creep into. She cannot quite work out why her mother seems so distant. At night she is visited by a mysterious guest, who might be able to give her some answers. With a new challenge every night, Leah is rewarded with bits of knowledge that, when pieced together, threaten to shine a dangerous light on both the truth in her nightmares and of the world she lives in.

programme.title: Blind Shaman
programme.desc: Once a powerful shaman, Tinh Lam used to be able to take on the evil forces of the world. Now stricken by a mysterious blindness, Tinh Lam has not only lost his eyesight, but most of his power. Setting out on a journey to recover his precious gifts, Tinh Lam is soon met by a wide variety of characters, each of whom teaches him important lessons about life. Tinh Lam slowly begins to understand that there is so much more to life than he originally believed. As his journey continues, he stumbles upon the plot of another wicked shaman. Tinh Lam soon begins to question whether there might be more to his blindness than mere chance. Could something or someone be behind his current condition? And if so, who will join him on his quest to uncover the truth?

programme.title: AUX
programme.desc: Deep in the woods, two boys discover the entrance to a secret military bunker that has remained hidden since World War II. They awaken something so deadly that one boy doesnt make it out alive and the other flees for his life, only to be hit by a car. A police investigation begins but, one by one, even the armed police are hunted and killed in grotesque and almost ritualistic ways. Meanwhile, at a local nursing home, an elderly WWII veteran watches all of this unfold on the news and realises what is happening. But will anybody believe a senile old man as the remorseless nightmare spreads?

programme.title: Hantu Gangster
programme.desc: In a small town located in Klang, a reckless rogue named Te Sai steals a ring during a gangster's memorial ceremony, not knowing that it is haunted by the ghosts of three former gang leaders. Te Sai soon finds out that the trio were killed by a traitor whose personal agenda threatens the very foundation of unity between the three gangs. Guided by the ghosts, Te Sai must now do what he can to unify the gangs and avoid a tragedy that may result in the deaths of many innocents.

programme.title: Jenny
programme.desc: A young woman's answer to a horror Bloody Mary challenge turns awry as she instead unleashes an evil spirit from her past to return to her life.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13
programme.desc: Gilang, 21, has decided to go on a vacation with two of his best friends, Sarah and Kevin to celebrate his birthday. The plan got disrupted with the presence of a couple uninvited guests. The atmosphere gets ominous as they drive into a forest and they start to see the appearance of a mysterious grandfather figure and a scary little girl. Unexpected terrors bestowed upon them which has forced Gilang to separate from his friends which also drove him to remember a cursed past of his.

programme.title: Nasi Tangas
programme.desc: Mira will do anything to get her husband's, Hairi, undivided love. programme.title: Haq
programme.desc: HAQ is an action-packed film that revolves around two brothers who possess extraordinary powers. The elder brother, known for his kindness and sense of justice, uses his abilities to help others and maintain peace. In stark contrast, the younger brother is consumed by his darker impulses and seeks to use his powers for personal gain and to instill fear.

programme.title: Vinegar Baths
programme.desc: This short horror film discusses pregnancies and the myth and lore surrounding pregnancies. A tired and overworked nurse at the maternity ward finds joy when she is alone roaming the hospital corridors at night. It's the time when she can finally eat.

programme.title: Exit 14
programme.desc: Laurie, a good-natured college student, embarks on a spring break vacation with her friends Faith, Joey, and her boyfriend Mick. They get off on the ghostly Exit 14 where they befriend a mysterious store clerk and are haunted by the self-fulfilling ghost stories he shares with them.

programme.title: Orphan First Kill
programme.desc: Prequel to the horror classic Orphan, this thrilling film begins with Leena Klammer orchestrating a brilliant escape from a psychiatric facility in Estonia. She then travels to America by impersonating the missing daughter of a wealthy family, Esther Albright. However, an unexpected twist arises that pits her against a mother who will do anything to protect her family at any cost.

Arriving at the remote psychiatric hospital, the new resident doctor tries to learn more about her patients, who share a specific delusion about the same supernatural entity.

programme.title: Araf 3: Book of Jinn
programme.desc: Nihal is willing to do anything to save her ill brother. Unable to find a medicine that can cure him of his mysterious disease, Nihal turns to spell books, hoping to find one that can heal him. She soon comes across the Book of Kitab'ul Azazil.

programme.desc: A divorced woman and her diabetic daughter take refuge in their newly-purchased house's safe room when three men break-in, searching for a missing fortune.

programme.desc: When the farmer's away, all the animals play, and sing, and dance. Eventually, though, someone has to step in and run things, a responsibility that ends up going to Otis, a carefree cow.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: When Vijay Singh Rajput is unceremoniously stripped of his duties as a bank manager, he decides to seek revenge by robbing the bank. To make the robbery untraceable, he trains three blind men to do the job for him.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: 3_Deewarein
programme.desc: A documentary filmmaker Chandrika soughts to capture the prison life of three men sentenced to death. Initially hesitant in trusting Chandrika, the men eventually open up and share their stories with her, which leads to some shocking revelations.

programme.title: Pavitra Paapi
programme.desc: Kedarnath feels guilty after knowing that the man he replaced at a job has killed himself. He then decides to support the man's family, so even if it means having to commit crimes for them.

programme.title: Deewaar: Let's Bring Our Heroes Home
programme.desc: A group of Indian POW (Prisoners of War) from the 1971 Indo-Pak war rebels against the Pakistani army and tries to escape from their captivity. Helping the group in the mission is Gaurav, the son of a former Army Major also held captive by the enemy.

programme.title: Tathastu... So Be It
programme.desc: Armed with a gun, a poor and desperate man seizes a hospital and its staff so that they focus on his child's operation, which turns into a hostage situation and a media circus.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
programme.desc: Sitaram is enraged when his son marries a girl of his own choice. Sitaram asks the couple to leave his house. Years later, his granddaughter comes to visit him with a gift from her father. The reason behind her parents' absence is shocking. What is it?

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Saajan Ki Saheli
programme.desc: Impregnated Kunti (Nutan) dumps her lover to marry a rich barrister. But she's unable to abort the illegitimate child, so she gives birth to and abandons the infant, who grows up to become the beautiful Munmun (Rekha). Munmun finds out the truth about her mother after her graduation and sets out to dig the past.

programme.title: Ekkees Tareekh Shubh Muhurat
programme.desc: A 55-year-old aspiring storyteller wanting to escape his family legacy of becoming a priest. His dream comes true in an unexpected way, when he is jailed and he finds an audience amongst the prisoners.

programme.title: Chal Mere Bhai
programme.desc: A standoffish businessman grieving the death of his girlfriend, falls in love with a vivacious girl working in his office, unaware of the fact that his younger brother is deeply in love with her too.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Phullu
programme.desc: Phullu an uneducated man realises the inconveniences which women go through during menstruation and sets out to create awareness about the issue.

programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: The life of a suicidal industrialist takes a sharp turn when he meets a spirited chatterbox on a train journey in this breezy Bollywood romantic comedy.

programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: The life of a suicidal industrialist takes a sharp turn when he meets a spirited chatterbox on a train journey in this breezy Bollywood romantic comedy.

programme.title: Raja Hindustani
programme.desc: A young taxi driver and a rich city girl fall head over heels in love with each other. Defying her family, she marries him and relocates to his village. But her family weaves a web of deception to split them apart.

programme.title: Firaaq
programme.desc: Inspired from the 2002 violence in Gujarat, this drama follows the lives of different people directly or indirectly affected by the riots, from a compassionate woman in an orthodox Gujarati family living with a stone-hearted husband, an urban cross-culture couple with a Hindu wife and a Muslim husband, a poor Muslim couple whose house is charred to ashes during the riots to an old Muslim singer. As their stories unfold and intertwine, we see the harrowing picture of the repercussions of violence in society.

programme.title: Global Baba
programme.desc: A criminal transforms himself into a spiritual guru after being betrayed by a political leader. He soon succeeds in attracting a large number of followers, manipulating society and establishing a position of power in politics.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.
